pi_items.source: Verified via scripts/install_astroimagej.sh which downloads the dataset from astro.louisville.edu and scripts/setup_task.sh which extracts the cached dataset.
Verified against setup_task.sh which creates and populates this directory with 30 FITS frames.
Verified against setup_task.sh which creates this directory, and export_result.sh which looks for outputs in this directory.
Verified against export_result.sh where max_file is checked against ground truth max_projection.
Verified against export_result.sh where median_file is checked against ground truth median_projection.
Verified against export_result.sh where diff_file is checked against the max-median difference.
Verified against export_result.sh which parses this file for the expected peak value.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 30 real astronomical FITS frames from the University of Louisville WASP-12b dataset. The input time-series is verified to be located at /home/ga/AstroImages/time_series. Output artifacts are verified to be expected in /home/ga/AstroImages/artifacts, including max_projection.fits, median_projection.fits, artifact_map.fits, and a text report artifact_stats.txt.
